What We Offer

Programs for Every Student

Structured, expert-led coaching from foundational learning to competitive exam mastery. Personalised attention for every student.

1
📚
Foundation Program
Strong academic fundamentals for Classes 4 to 7. Building conceptual clarity in Maths, Science and English from the ground up.
Class 4–7MathsScienceEnglish
2
🎓
Board Preparation
Focused board exam coaching for Classes 8 to 10 — covering Goa Board and CBSE syllabus with regular mock tests and revision.
Class 8–10Goa BoardCBSEMock Tests
3
⚖️
Science Stream
Advanced PCM & PCB coaching for Class 11 and 12 — Board, JEE and NEET preparation with expert faculty and structured curriculum.
Class 11–12PCMPCBJEE PrepNEET Prep
4
💼
Commerce Stream — 11th & 12th
Dedicated Commerce coaching for Class 11 & 12 — Accounts, Economics, Business Studies and Maths. Board-focused with career guidance for commerce students.
Class 11–12AccountsEconomicsBusiness StudiesBoard Exams
5
🏛
GSSC & GPSC Coaching
Expert preparation for Goa government exams — GSSC and GPSC. Daily classes, study material, mock tests and strategy guidance.
GSSCGPSCDaily ClassesFree
6
⭐
Elite Mentorship
Premium personalised coaching for high-achieving students. Individual attention, performance tracking, parent interaction and career planning.
Premium1-on-1Performance Tracking
7
🌟
Doubt & Mentorship Sessions
Regular doubt-solving sessions, motivational guidance and academic planning to keep every student on track throughout the year.
Doubt SolvingMotivationPlanning
Academic Partnership
Academic Partner: The Bodhi Academy
Hinde Classes is the official Academic Partner of The Bodhi Academy — serving students across Bicholim and Sattari Talukas, Goa. Together providing comprehensive academic support, competitive exam preparation and premium mentorship to students across the region.
✓ Bicholim Taluka ✓ Sattari Taluka ✓ Board + Competitive ✓ Established Partnership
Why Students Choose Us

Learning That Goes Beyond the Classroom

At Hinde Classes we don't just teach — we mentor, motivate and build careers. Our approach combines academic rigour with personal attention.

📚
Expert Faculty & Structured Curriculum
Experienced teachers with deep subject knowledge delivering structured, syllabus-aligned content.
📈
Regular Tests & Performance Tracking
Weekly assessments, detailed analysis and parent communication to track every student's growth.
🤝
Personal Mentorship
Every student gets individual attention — their strengths understood, their weaknesses addressed.
🏭
Dual Location Coverage
Serving students across Bicholim and Sattari talukas with accessible premium coaching.
🏆
Proven Track Record
500+ students mentored with 95% pass rates and consistent board toppers year after year.
Our Leadership

The Team Behind Your Success

Maitreya Hinde
Founder & Managing Director
Founder of Hinde Classes with 5+ years of academic leadership in Bicholim. Expert faculty for JEE & NEET preparation. Academic partner of The Bodhi Academy. Personally conducts government exam coaching and elite mentorship sessions.
JEE/NEET ExpertFounderGSSC/GPSC ExpertElite Mentor

Namrata Prabhu Hinde
Head — Elite Mentorship & Wellness
Leads the Elite Mentorship program at Hinde Classes and MHC Wellness. Drives premium student results through personalised coaching, parent engagement, student performance tracking and nutrition-wellness integration.

MH
Manoj Hinde
Finance Director & HC × TBA Head
